# PropertyHack

> Agenda-free Australian property news, market updates, and analysis.

PropertyHack aggregates and AI-summarises property news from across Australia, covering Sydney, Melbourne, Brisbane, Perth, Adelaide, Canberra, Hobart, Darwin, and Gold Coast.

## Key Sections

- [Homepage](https://propertyhack.com.au/): Latest property news feed with search and location filters
- [Sydney Property News](https://propertyhack.com.au/property-news/sydney)
- [Melbourne Property News](https://propertyhack.com.au/property-news/melbourne)
- [Brisbane Property News](https://propertyhack.com.au/property-news/brisbane)
- [Perth Property News](https://propertyhack.com.au/property-news/perth)
- [Adelaide Property News](https://propertyhack.com.au/property-news/adelaide)
- [Canberra Property News](https://propertyhack.com.au/property-news/canberra)
- [Hobart Property News](https://propertyhack.com.au/property-news/hobart)
- [Darwin Property News](https://propertyhack.com.au/property-news/darwin)
- [Gold Coast Property News](https://propertyhack.com.au/property-news/gold-coast)
- [About](https://propertyhack.com.au/about)
- [Contact](https://propertyhack.com.au/contact)

## Public API

Articles feed (JSON): `GET https://propertyhack.com.au/api/public/articles`
- Query params: `page`, `limit`, `search`, `location`, `category`
- Returns paginated list of property news articles with title, summary, category, location, and source attribution

## Feeds & Discovery

- [RSS Feed](https://propertyhack.com.au/feed.xml)
- [Sitemap](https://propertyhack.com.au/sitemap.xml)
- [Full LLM Reference](https://propertyhack.com.au/llms-full.txt)
